column1: Yandy Diaz leads the slate with a strong track record of consistency, hitting safely in over 77% of games and showing a recent uptick at the plate. He draws a favorable matchup with platoon advantage against Sam Aldegheri, further boosting his reliability. Luis Arraez remains a steady option in the two-hole, also benefiting from a platoon edge and a similar hit rate. Xavier Edwards and Ernie Clement offer solid alternatives, but Diaz stands out for Beat The Streak selections today.
